hardware.source: RunAI talmo-lab cluster, preemptible; exact node not auto-captured. The co-submitted smoke run on the same fleet reported 45403 MB total GPU memory (A40/48GB signature) and the talmo-lab GPU fleet is A40.

note: T2b operator ellipsoid re-run: CFD ran on a RunAI talmo-lab preemptible A40 (see hardware); geometry_type=2, byte-unchanged deck. run_metadata was assembled on the local analysis box (see analysis_host).

analysis_host.note: local box where run_metadata was assembled post-hoc (nvidia-smi captured the analysis workstation) — NOT the CFD run node
